request: Create a sales dashboard with total revenue, top 10 customers by order count, and monthly order trends

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount)) FROM "Order Details"

sql_queries.title: Top 10 Customers by Order Count
sql_queries.description: Customers with the highest number of orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT C.CompanyName, COUNT(O.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Customers AS C JOIN Orders AS O ON C.CustomerID = O.CustomerID GROUP BY C.CompanyName ORDER BY OrderCount DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Monthly Order Trend
sql_queries.description: Trend of orders placed over time, grouped by month
sql_queries.sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, COUNT(OrderID) AS NumberOfOrders FROM Orders GROUP BY OrderMonth ORDER BY OrderMonth
